title: BUA Group Signs Contract for State-of-the-Art Wheat Conveying Equipment - FinancialEDGE
description: BUA Group signs contract for construction and installation of 2million Metric Tonnes Per Annum modern Wheat Conveying & Handling Equipment - from BUA Ports to BUA Flour & Pasta Mills, Port-Harcourt, Rivers State. Photo Caption: R - L: Abdul Samad Rabiu, Founder/Executive Chairman, BUA Group, and Okcul Barlik, CEO, Agrimac Makina Limited, during the contract
html:
BUA Group signs contract for construction and installation of 2million Metric Tonnes Per Annum modern Wheat Conveying & Handling Equipment – from BUA Ports to BUA Flour & Pasta Mills, Port-Harcourt, Rivers State.

Photo Caption:  R – L: Abdul Samad Rabiu, Founder/Executive Chairman, BUA Group, and Okcul Barlik, CEO, Agrimac Makina Limited, during the contract signing event earlier today – at the BUA Group Middle East Office, Dubai, UAE.
